data.content: Implementation complete on branch feat/cli-completions. Added clap_complete workspace dependency and a new 'completions' subcommand (crates/loom-cli/src/commands/completions.rs) that generates shell completion scripts for bash, zsh, fish, powershell, and elvish. Wired into Commands enum in main.rs. 5 unit tests (one per shell) all pass. Full test suite (126 tests) passes. Branch pushed to origin.
